title: Bridge Paper: Full body illusion and cognition: A systematic review of the literature.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** body representation, rubber hand illusion, multisensory integration, body ownership, bodily self

Paper: Full body illusion and cognition: A systematic review of the literature.
DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2022.104926
Abstract: In recent years, an increasing number of studies employed the full body illusion paradigm (i.e., the experimentally induced illusory ownership over a fake/virtual body) to investigate the role of body ownership in higher-level cognition. However, to date, no systematic review of this topic is present. To fill this gap, here we identified 102 papers classifiable in 4 cognitive domains and 12 subdomains. Overall, they manipulated the identity of the fake body, and/or its spatial perspective, and/o

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-11. Phase 2 (Physical De-solidification).
